Review Conditional Access policies for location-based restrictions that may block Buenos Aires office IPs

next_best_action: Investigate Azure SQL connection pool exhaustion on the client-facing portfolio management API immediately. 60% request failure rate on a production system affecting all clients. Circuit breaker has tripped and read replica has stale data with 45s replication lag.
remediation_steps: Investigate connection pool exhaustion on the primary Azure SQL database — identify long-running queries or connection leaks
Kill long-running queries or leaked connections to free up pool capacity
Restart the primary database connection pool or the application layer to recover
Address the read replica replication lag — 45s lag is causing stale data errors on failover reads
Post-incident: review connection pool configuration and implement connection timeout/max-lifetime settings to prevent recurrence

next_best_action: Investigate laptop performance degradation that started after the March 14 SAP system upgrade. Check Windows Update history and Intune compliance status.

Review Task Manager for high CPU/disk usage from background processes like Windows Update, Intune, or antivirus
